needs_manual.reason: The 2024 per-category draw odds PDFs (random, pref points, etc.) are on this page under a 2024 accordion; could not extract individual 2024 media IDs from fetch. The 2024 summary report was downloaded separately.

notes: All 24 files verified as valid PDFs with expected file sizes.
WGFD restructured their website; old URLs under /Hunting/ now redirect or 404. Current structure uses /licenses-applications/ and /hunting-trapping/ paths.
Draw odds are broken out by: species, residency (res/nonres/nonres special), and draw type (random, preference point, cow/calf or doe/fawn, leftover).
Harvest reports cover all hunt areas statewide with success rates, total harvest, hunter effort, and trend data.
The 2024 and 2025 draw odds summary reports contain combined odds data across all species in a single PDF each.
For 2024 per-category draw odds (equivalent to the 2025 breakouts), check the draw-results-odds page under the 2024 section or use the Hunt Planner.
WGFD Hunt Planner (https://wgfd.wyo.gov/HuntPlanner) is the best interactive tool for unit-level draw odds and harvest stats but requires manual use.
Resident preference point draw odds are not published as separate PDFs - resident draws use a squared preference point system detailed in the draw odds summary reports.
